series_metadata.series_title: Application for Duplicate or Substitute Warrant
series_metadata.series_description: Used when the payee has received the warrant and it has been lost, stolen or destroyed. Includes the application and a copy of the bond.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one year audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: one year audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released
